visual_summary: Typewriter Demo is a UI component that mimics a typewriter effect. It is useful when a developer wants to add dynamic text display with a delay.
generation_prompt: Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics: Name: typewriter-demo Description: Typewriter Demo is a UI component that mimics a typewriter effect. It is useful when a developer wants to add dynamic text display with a delay. No explanations.
